title: Katie, Aged Five Years.
content:
(ASLEEP IN THE DAYTIME.)

title: The Snowdrop Monument (In Lichfield Cathedral).
content:
Marvels of sleep, grown cold!

title: Seven Times One. Exultation.
content:
There's no dew left on the daisies and clover,
    There's no rain left in heaven:
    I've said my "seven times" over and over,
    Seven time

title: Bees And Other Fellow-Creatures.
Songs On The Voices Of Birds. A Poet In His Youth, And The Cuckoo-Bird.
content:
Once upon a time, I lay
    Fast asleep at dawn of day;
    Windows open to the south,
    Fancy pouting her sweet mouth
    To my ear.

title: Song For A Babe.
content:
Little babe, while burns the west,
    Warm thee, warm thee in my breast;
    While the moon doth shine her best,
        And the dews distil n

content:

content:
